summary: Full e2e testing of SCM Group corporate website - all backend APIs and frontend pages tested successfully. Contact form, career application flow, navigation, mobile menu all working.

issues: Logo appears white/blank in footer on dark background - may be a logo color inversion issue worth checking

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and straightforward - no major issues
All env vars properly used - no hardcoded values
seed_data_creation: Test contact submission and career application created via tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages and flows tested and working. Backend: 7/7 tests pass. Frontend: Home, About, Careers (expand+apply modal+submit), Contact (form+submit), Clients, mobile hamburger menu all verified working.
